'''鈭歴h-m-dh''' ('''shamadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neurosecrete|neurosecrete]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neurosecrete|neurosecrete]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-m-dh
|-
! Lemma
| shamadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamadhithi|shamadhithi]] || [[word:shamadhiji|shamadhiji]] || [[word:shamadhishi|shamadhishi]] || [[word:shamadhi|shamadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shamadhuthuth|shamadhuthuth]] || [[word:shamadhujuj|shamadhujuj]] || [[word:shamadhushush|shamadhushush]] || [[word:shamadh|shamadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamadhuthu|shamadhuthu]] || [[word:shamadhuju|shamadhuju]] || [[word:shamadhushu|shamadhushu]] || [[word:shamadhu|shamadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamadhufuth|shamadhufuth]] || [[word:shamadhufuj|shamadhufuj]] || [[word:shamadhufush|shamadhufush]] || [[word:shamadhuf|shamadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamadhethe|shamadhethe]] || [[word:shamadheje|shamadheje]] || [[word:shamadheshe|shamadheshe]] || [[word:shamadhe|shamadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shamadhothoth|shamadhothoth]] || [[word:shamadhojoj|shamadhojoj]] || [[word:shamadhoshosh|shamadhoshosh]] || [[word:shamadh|shamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamadhotho|shamadhotho]] || [[word:shamadhojo|shamadhojo]] || [[word:shamadhosho|shamadhosho]] || [[word:shamadho|shamadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamadhofoth|shamadhofoth]] || [[word:shamadhofoj|shamadhofoj]] || [[word:shamadhofosh|shamadhofosh]] || [[word:shamadhof|shamadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamadh忙th忙|shamadh忙th忙]] || [[word:shamadh忙j忙|shamadh忙j忙]] || [[word:shamadh忙sh忙|shamadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:shamadh忙|shamadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shamadhathath|shamadhathath]] || [[word:shamadhajaj|shamadhajaj]] || [[word:shamadhashash|shamadhashash]] || [[word:shamadh|shamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamadhatha|shamadhatha]] || [[word:shamadhaja|shamadhaja]] || [[word:shamadhasha|shamadhasha]] || [[word:shamadha|shamadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamadhafath|shamadhafath]] || [[word:shamadhafaj|shamadhafaj]] || [[word:shamadhafash|shamadhafash]] || [[word:shamadhaf|shamadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shamadhasha|shamadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamadhasha|goshamadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamadhasha|gokishamadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shamadhn眉sha|shamadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamadhnkn眉sha|goshamadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamadhn眉sha|gokishamadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamadhsh毛sha|shamadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamadhnksh毛sha|goshamadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamadhsh毛sha|gokishamadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamadhrosha|shamadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamadhnkrosha|goshamadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamadhrosha|gokishamadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamadhmusha|shamadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamadhnkmusha|goshamadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamadhmusha|gokishamadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamadhsherasha|shamadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamadhnksherasha|goshamadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamadhsherasha|gokishamadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamadhngasha|shamadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamadhnkngasha|goshamadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamadhngasha|gokishamadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamadhyasha|shamadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamadhnkyasha|goshamadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamadhyasha|gokishamadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamadhyamasha|shamadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamadhnkyamasha|goshamadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamadhyamasha|gokishamadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamadhn眉sh毛sha|shamadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamadhnkn眉sh毛sha|goshamadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamadhn眉sh毛sha|gokishamadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamadhn眉rosha|shamadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamadhnkn眉rosha|goshamadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamadhn眉rosha|gokishamadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamadhn眉musha|shamadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamadhnkn眉musha|goshamadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamadhn眉musha|gokishamadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamadhsh毛n眉sha|shamadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamadhnksh毛n眉sha|goshamadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamadhsh毛n眉sha|gokishamadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamadhsh毛rosha|shamadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamadhnksh毛rosha|goshamadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamadhsh毛rosha|gokishamadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamadhsh毛musha|shamadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamadhnksh毛musha|goshamadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamadhsh毛musha|gokishamadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamadhron眉sha|shamadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamadhnkron眉sha|goshamadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamadhron眉sha|gokishamadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamadhrosh毛sha|shamadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamadhnkrosh毛sha|goshamadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamadhrosh毛sha|gokishamadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamadhromusha|shamadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamadhnkromusha|goshamadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamadhromusha|gokishamadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamadhmun眉sha|shamadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamadhnkmun眉sha|goshamadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamadhmun眉sha|gokishamadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamadhmush毛sha|shamadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamadhnkmush毛sha|goshamadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamadhmush毛sha|gokishamadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamadhmurosha|shamadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamadhnkmurosha|goshamadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamadhmurosha|gokishamadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shamadh|shamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙m忙dh|sh忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshamadh|hoshamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙m忙dh|hosh忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshamadh|hohoshamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙m忙dh|hohosh忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shamadh|n眉shamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙m忙dh|n眉sh忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shamadh|n眉n眉shamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙m忙dh|n眉n眉sh忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shamadh|n茂shamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙m忙dh|n茂sh忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shamadh|n茂n茂shamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙m忙dh|n茂n茂sh忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushamadh|lushamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙m忙dh|lush忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushamadh|lulushamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙m忙dh|lulush忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishamadh|lishamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙m忙dh|lish忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishamadh|lilishamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙m忙dh|lilish忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshamadh|koshamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙m忙dh|kosh忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshamadh|kokoshamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙m忙dh|kokosh忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshamadh|keshamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙m忙dh|kesh忙m忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshamadh|kekeshamadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙m忙dh|kekesh忙m忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
